outputs.patch.diff:
--- a/programs/tlf_ae_overview.R
+++ b/programs/tlf_ae_overview.R
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@
 # Read ADSL and ADAE
 adsl <- read_xpt("data/05_adam/adsl.xpt")
 adae <- read_xpt("data/05_adam/adae.xpt")
-adsl_sub <- adsl[adsl$ITTFL == "Y", ]
+adsl_sub <- adsl[adsl$SAFFL == "Y", ]
 
 # Create treatment groups
 trt_groups <- unique(adsl_sub$TRT01AN)
@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@
   for (j in seq_along(trt_groups)) {
     trt <- trt_groups[j]
     subj_ids <- adsl_sub$USUBJID[adsl_sub$TRT01AN == trt]
-    ae_sub <- adae[adae$USUBJID %in% subj_ids, ]
+    ae_sub <- adae[adae$USUBJID %in% subj_ids & adae$TRTEMFL == "Y", ]
     
     # Count subjects with at least one AE
     n_subj_ae <- length(unique(ae_sub$USUBJID[ae_sub$AOCC01FL == "Y"]))
@@ -40,7 +40,7 @@
     n_subj_death <- length(unique(ae_sub$USUBJID[ae_sub$AEOUT == "FATAL"]))
     
     # Count total events
-    n_events <- nrow(ae_sub)
+    n_events <- length(unique(ae_sub$USUBJID))
     
     # Store results
     results[i, j + 1] <- sprintf("%d (%d%%)", n_subj_ae, round(100 * n_subj_ae / n_subj))
